body:
# Bug report

## Current behavior

I am trying to imlement a `Radiogroup` in a `form` following the example provided in [the docs](https://base-ui.com/react/components/radio#form-integration).

However, the example code yields a `div` with `role='radiogroup'`, but no accessible label. The radio group _is_ wrapped in a `fieldset` with an accessible `label` but the `radiogroup` role itself does not provide a proper label.

Furthermore, having the `role='radiogroup'` inside a `fieldset` causes nested accessible `group` elements, which could also be a cause of confusion for assistive technologies

## Expected behavior

According to [ARIA specs](https://www.w3.org/TR/wai-aria/#radiogroup), a `radiogroup` SHOULD provide an accessible label directly associated with the role element.

In previous versions (1.0.0-beta.2), I have been able to wrap the `Radiogroup` in a `Field`, which would associate the `Field.Label` with the `RadioGroup`, but this no longer seems to work.

## Reproducible example

[CodeSandbox example](https://codesandbox.io/p/sandbox/baseui-radiogroup-clnhnp?file=%2Fsrc%2Fcomponents%2FFormExample.tsx%3A20%2C81)

## Base UI version

1.0.0-beta.3

## Which browser are you using?

Edge

## Which OS are you using?

Win 11
title: [radiogroup] Potential A11y issue in form example from docs
